user_input: 轻量化无人机小目标检测
clarification_questions: 更偏向提升小目标精度、降低计算量，还是两者平衡？
是否有明确部署设备，例如 Jetson、普通 GPU 或尚未确定？

must_verify: TensorRT/ONNX path if Jetson is chosen
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A reproducible lightweight one-stage detector with maintained code and deployable export path.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: reduce loss of spatial detail for tiny targets

candidate_families: sparse high-resolution computation such as QueryDet-style routing
parallel_expectations.mechanism: offset the cost of high-resolution processing

candidate_families: existing YOLO plus P2 aerial detectors
parallel_expectations.mechanism: detect whether the apparent contribution is already saturated

hypothesis: Under aerial small-object conditions, repeated downsampling loses spatial evidence; adding one high-resolution shallow branch should improve AP_small while a lightweight fusion operator keeps latency within the selected device guardrail.

alternatives: use sparse regional high-resolution processing only if the P2 pilot violates latency
choose distillation/quantization rather than architecture changes when deployment is the dominant goal
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Freeze a nano/tiny detector, add only a P2/high-resolution branch first, then lightweight only that added path if device profiling shows excessive cost.
reject: P2 + attention + new head + new loss in the first experiment

experiment_plan: E2 E1 + lightweight operator on added branch
optional E3 sparse routing only after E2 profiling
report AP/AP_small, params, FLOPs, memory, TensorRT latency/FPS, at least 3 seeds where feasible
stop_conditions: Stop if AP_small gain disappears under matched resolution and training budget.
Stop if latency/energy guardrail fails after lightweight optimization.
Revise if novelty search finds an effectively identical P2-plus-lightweight architecture.

required: distinguish verified, inferred, proposed, and unknown statements
verify supplied-paper identity and role before using it
reject irrelevant retrieval results even when DOI or metadata is valid
bind every core paper to a specific gap, module, comparison, or risk role
produce a minimal pilot before a full combined method
forbidden: fabricate paper identifiers, results, code availability, or reproduced metrics
treat keyword overlap as sufficient evidence
force supplied papers to be compatible
claim novelty from A+B+C composition alone
hide stronger baselines, failed modules, or negative results

user_input: 想做一个适合边缘设备部署的道路裂缝检测模型
clarification_questions: 你需要输出裂缝框、像素级裂缝区域，还是只判断是否存在裂缝？
目标设备是手机、Jetson，还是其他嵌入式设备？

candidate_families: YOLO nano detector when box output is sufficient
must_verify: image resolution and minimum crack scale
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A reproducible lightweight segmentation or detection baseline selected only after output type is clarified.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: reduce runtime cost without changing task semantics

hypothesis: For thin cracks, aggressive encoder downsampling removes boundary evidence; an edge-aware lightweight decoder or boundary loss should increase recall/IoU for narrow cracks without exceeding device latency.

alternatives: switch to detection if pixel masks are not required
use tiling when crack scale is smaller than the network stride
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: First freeze a lightweight segmentation baseline; add one edge/boundary mechanism, then apply post-training or quantization-aware compression as a separate deployment stage.
reject: selecting a detector before clarifying output type
comparing different image resolutions without controlling compute

experiment_plan: report IoU/F1/recall on thin-crack subset plus latency and memory
stop_conditions: Stop if gains occur only from larger input resolution.
Revise if annotations are too coarse for pixel-level claims.
No-go for real-time claims without hardware measurement.

required: distinguish verified, inferred, proposed, and unknown statements
verify supplied-paper identity and role before using it
reject irrelevant retrieval results even when DOI or metadata is valid
bind every core paper to a specific gap, module, comparison, or risk role
produce a minimal pilot before a full combined method
forbidden: fabricate paper identifiers, results, code availability, or reproduced metrics
treat keyword overlap as sufficient evidence
force supplied papers to be compatible

user_input: 医学影像中的皮肤病变分类和可解释性分析
clarification_questions: 准备做良恶性二分类还是多类别病变分类？
解释性是用于模型审查，还是希望提出临床有效性主张？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A reproducible CNN/ViT image classifier on a public dermoscopy dataset.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: inspect evidence localization without equating heatmaps with causality

hypothesis: Under imbalanced dermoscopy data, standard empirical risk minimization underweights rare lesions; class-balanced optimization should improve macro metrics while post-hoc explanations are used only for auditing, not clinical causality claims.

alternatives: calibrated thresholding when deployment cost matters
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Use one imbalance intervention on a frozen classifier and a separate explanation audit; do not present Grad-CAM as a mechanism that improves classification unless tested as training supervision.
reject: attention plus Grad-CAM as two independent novelty modules
clinical effectiveness claims from a single public dataset

experiment_plan: report macro-F1, balanced accuracy, AUC, calibration, subgroup errors
stop_conditions: Stop clinical claims without external validation.
Revise if class imbalance is not the dominant failure mode.
No-go if leakage exists across patients or augmented duplicates.

required: distinguish verified, inferred, proposed, and unknown statements
verify supplied-paper identity and role before using it
reject irrelevant retrieval results even when DOI or metadata is valid

user_input: 基于深度学习的钢材表面缺陷检测优化
clarification_questions: 需要定位缺陷位置，还是只分类缺陷类型？
是否面向在线产线实时检测，还是离线质检？

baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A reproducible detector/classifier matched to annotation type and production constraints.

hypothesis: For small and texture-similar steel defects, coarse feature fusion and easy negatives dominate training; one shallow-feature or hard-negative intervention should improve minority-defect recall without increasing production false alarms.

alternatives: anomaly detection when unseen defects are central
domain adaptation when camera shift dominates
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: Choose either a feature-side intervention or an objective-side intervention for the first pilot, then combine only if both independently help distinct failure sets.
reject: simultaneously changing backbone, neck, loss, and augmentation
using aggregate mAP without per-defect recall

experiment_plan: E3 interaction only if mechanisms are complementary
report per-class recall, false positives per image, latency, robustness to lighting/camera shifts
stop_conditions: Stop if gain is only from test-set tuning.
Revise if annotation type does not support detection claims.
No-go for online deployment without false-alarm and latency evidence.

required: distinguish verified, inferred, proposed, and unknown statements
verify supplied-paper identity and role before using it

user_input: 遥感图像中的密集小目标检测
clarification_questions: 目标是否具有明显方向性，需要旋转框检测吗？
更关注整幅大图精度，还是可部署的推理效率？

candidate_families: small-object one-stage detector for axis-aligned data
baseline_expectation.preferred_role: A reproducible aerial/remote-sensing detector matching box geometry.

parallel_expectations.mechanism: reduce overlap suppression and orientation mismatch

hypothesis: Dense remote-sensing objects are lost through coarse features and suppressed by standard NMS; matching the geometry head and density-aware suppression should improve recall at fixed resolution and compute.

alternatives: tiling policy optimization as a non-neural baseline
sparse refinement for very large images
tailoring_advice.recommended_stitch: First choose oriented or axis-aligned baseline correctly; test density-aware suppression separately from high-resolution feature changes.
reject: calling an oriented detector novel solely because the dataset is aerial
comparing different crop overlap settings as model gains

experiment_plan: report AP by scale, crowded recall, duplicate detections, end-to-end image latency
stop_conditions: Stop if improvement vanishes with matched tiling/NMS.
Revise if object orientation labels are unavailable.
No-go for efficiency claim without whole-image runtime.
